body_preview: - Day 139 morning session landed a +61 line unit test in test_append_terminal_state_events.py that validates deduplication of retroactive FailureObserved events (commit b45050f2). - The production code path in scripts/append_terminal_state_events.py already handles open_after_FailureObserved runs (lines 230, 280-281, 514-515). - Capability fitness score=1.0,

title: Add held-out eval fixture for FailureObserved dedup lifecycle scenario
